## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [4 articles delivered this week; 2 queued for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic doubled organic traffic, indicating content authority](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Technical issues in Webflow templates affecting SEO; need urgent attention](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Shifting focus to broader, top-funnel topics based on competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Workflow

  - [3 articles delivered, 1 in progress (due tomorrow)](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [2 articles queued for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Proposal: GrowthX to add blog titles to general backgrounds for non-main index articles](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Scheduled topics for coming weeks focus on broader, top-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Data engineering skills article not indexed due to technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Multiple h1 headings, templated h2/h3 headings causing confusion for Google](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Template cleanup needed in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [15-minute call planned with technical SEO specialist to address issues](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Performance Update

  - [Included referral traffic from AI/LLMs in reporting](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Organic traffic held steady](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [LLM referrals (e.g., Claude, Anthropic) driving significant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [ELT log example article cited as authoritative source in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

### LLM Visibility and Strategy

  - [Strong brand presence across multiple channels may improve LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Search Console Integration

  - [GSC data to be integrated into future reports](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Will provide insights on impressions, exact search queries, clicks, and positions](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Helpful for tracking progress on intent-related and long-tail keyword searches](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)

### Lead Generation

  - [Noticing increase in organic leads (e.g., Optum, Lemonade Insurance)](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [Plan to create Salesforce report to track organic leads and content influence](https://fathom.video/share/Vr8soSLjqX7vnMYCr4xenZgCEGfgaLuS?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
